title: Whats the shuttle called
wikitext:
[]: What's the shuttle called?             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Sat Jul 24, 2010 8:08 pm In Rebuild, Gendo and Fuyutsuki Flew to the Moon (Pun intended) on a shuttle, which was also seen on the TV version. Anyone know what that shuttle is or what it's called?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sat Jul 24, 2010 8:37 pm Graciously pulled from another topic: Looks like it is called XLS - 1701. There was talk about 1701 being a Star Trek reference.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jul 25, 2010 3:23 am That's XL5 - 1701 .

[]:             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Sun Jul 25, 2010 9:15 am and it flies to the moon onits own power?
